channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Hezbollah pauses attacks, sources say, Israel says operations in Lebanon continue
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Ceasefire threatened as Israel expands Lebanon strikes, Iran closes strait again
- Iran threatens to end ceasefire over Hezbollah's exclusion from truce deal
- Iran vows to ‘punish’ Israel over Lebanon strikes and ceasefire breach
- FirstFT: Middle East ceasefire under pressure over Israeli attacks on Lebanon
- Iran says peace talks would be 'unreasonable' following Israeli strikes on Lebanon
- What to know about Israel’s strikes on Lebanon amid US-Iran ceasefire
- Israel carries out violent strikes across Lebanon
- Lebanon clouds Iran-US ceasefire ahead of talks: Is it included or not? Explained
- Middle East ceasefire under pressure over Israeli strikes on Lebanon
- World reacts to ‘brutal’ Israeli attacks on Lebanon after US-Iran truce
- Iran accuses US of ‘reneging’ on ceasefire terms over Lebanon
- World reacts to ‘brutal’ Israeli attacks on Lebanon after US-Iran truce
- Israel offered to check itself in Lebanon strikes to promote Iran ceasefire, VP Vance claims
- UN calls for investigation into Israeli strikes on Lebanon after US truce with Iran
- Israeli Airstrikes Kill At Least 182 In Lebanon, Hours After Iran War Ceasefire

- Israel pounds Lebanon with heaviest airstrikes of war as Hezbollah pauses attacks
- Trump backs Israel, says Lebanon a ‘separate skirmish’ after ceasefire
- Iran shuts Strait of Hormuz hours after ceasefire; Global oil route blocked with Lebanon explosion

- Israel kills dozens in Beirut, claims Lebanon is not part of Iran truce
